project_type: Vue 3 SPA quiz game (Kiro Quest) - currently hosted on Cloudflare Workers, migrating to AWS
build_system: Vite with vue-tsc for type checking, tsx for scripts
test_framework: Vitest with @vue/test-utils and fast-check for property-based testing
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install, 2. Run npm run typecheck, 3. Run npm test, 4. Run npm run build
environment_constraints: No Docker daemon confirmed. Use host-based validation with pre-installed Node.js. CDK/CloudFormation templates can be validated with cdk synth or cfn-lint if available.
contribution_requirements: Open source project, PRs welcome. Uses Kiro code review workflow on PRs.
key_patterns: - Router uses hash mode (createWebHashHistory) for SPA compatibility. - Progress is persisted via progressTracker using localStorage with versioned key 'kiro-quest:progress:v1'. - Pinia store (quizStore) orchestrates all quiz logic and calls progressTracker.persist() on state changes. - Lazy-loaded routes for code splitting. - Content is stored as static JSON in content/ directory (questions and answers). - i18n is pt-BR only currently.
directory_structure: kiro-quest/ - Root with Vite config, TS configs, wrangler.jsonc (Cloudflare). content/ - Static JSON questions/answers/i18n per locale. src/ - Vue app with components/, views/, stores/, engine/, progress/, router/, i18n/, composables/, data/, sharing/, badges/. scripts/ - Build and validation scripts. public/ - Static assets. .github/workflows/ - CI (Kiro code review).
